description_en: Zagreb may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 33 halal restaurants and 1 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Zagreb, Croatia, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Zagreb: 31 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
